title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 21 2023
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 21 2023
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 21 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 21/02/2023
DCE iron ore futures rose by 3.43 % today, the main contract closed 919.The traders' willingness to ship is more.The steel mills are active to purchase . The overalltrading sentiment of the market is better.PBF at Shandong port deal 913-915 yuan/mt, increase 8-20 yuan/ mt.PBF at Tangshan port deal 925-927 yuan/mt,increase 18-22 yuan/mt. At present, the iron ore price is still aﬀected by the macro and news aspects, the supply side of the fundamentals is tight, the molten iron of the blast furnace slowly rises, and the supply and demand pattern has little change.
